entity.summary: Decentralized exchange on The Open Network providing token swaps and liquidity-pool trading for TON ecosystem assets.
entity.notes: The official DeDust domain remains live and identifies the service as a DEX on TON. The initial record does not assert an exact launch date because a sufficiently precise first-party launch source was not selected.

evidence.title: DeDust official DEX website
evidence.notes: Official domain remains live and identifies DeDust as a DEX on TON.

evidence.title: DeDust exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary registry corroborates DeDust as an exchange venue; first-party domain remains the current-status authority.

evidence.title: DeDust protocol discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry corroborates DeDust as a TON ecosystem exchange protocol.
